# awscc_securityagent_application (Resource)

Resource Type definition for AWS::SecurityAgent::Application



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `default_kms_key_id` (String) Identifier of a KMS key. Can be a key ID, key ARN, alias name, or alias ARN.
- `id_c_configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--id_c_configuration))
- `role_arn` (String)
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags for the application (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

### Read-Only

- `application_id` (String)
- `application_name` (String)
- `domain` (String)
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

<a id="nestedatt--id_c_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `id_c_configuration`

Optional:

- `id_c_instance_arn` (String)

Read-Only:

- `id_c_application_arn` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Optional:

- `key` (String) The key name of the tag
- `value` (String) The value for the tag

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_securityagent_application.example
  identity = {
    application_id = "application_id"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `application_id` (String)

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_securityagent_application.example
  id = "application_id"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_securityagent_application.example "application_id"
```
